positive: A whimsical, stylized woodland scene featuring a graceful deer silhouette leaping over glowing mushrooms and delicate forest flowers. The art style should be inspired by vintage botanical illustrations and modern graphic design, utilizing a limited, highly contrasting color palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and creamy beige. The composition must be perfectly balanced and centered, with the deer placed dynamically in the foreground. Strong, clean lines and solid color blocks are essential for easy printing on textiles. The background should be abstract and textural, resembling watercolor washes or stamped paper texture. Highly detailed, clean vector art style, graphic novel aesthetic, perfect symmetry, central composition, rule of thirds.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, logo, watermark, noise, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, realistic photo, messy, grunge, signature, out of frame
